system.name: SIR Epidemic
system.description: Compartmental epidemic as a conservative primitive composition (Mobus process primitives, synchronous update mode). Susceptible, Infected, Recovered are Buffering stocks. An I-Sensor reads the Infected level through a non-draining observation flow and feeds a Message control into Susceptible; S's regulated release is the infection transfer S->I (gated by sensed I, drawn from S). Infected releases to Recovered at a constant recovery rate. The epidemic curve emerges entirely from the wiring; mass is conserved to machine epsilon. Seed storages via initial_state (S=100, I=5, R=0) and run with --update-mode synchronous.

subsystems.name: Susceptible
subsystems.description: Susceptible population stock; drained by infection

subsystems.name: Infected
subsystems.description: Infected population stock; gains from infection, loses to recovery

subsystems.name: Recovered
subsystems.description: Recovered population stock; terminal, monotonically increasing

subsystems.name: I-Sensor
subsystems.description: Senses the Infected level (non-draining) and emits the infection-rate control signal
